summary: The user recently purchased a new slow cooker from Best Buy's online store and is seeking inspiration for recipes, specifically expressing interest in making Beef Stew. The session included discussions on browning beef, selecting the right potatoes, pairing side dishes, and preparing healthy snacks in advance.
facts: The user bought a new slow cooker from Best Buy's online store on the same day of the chat. The user plans to start cooking with the slow cooker by making Beef Stew. The user intends to brown the beef in a Dutch oven for the Beef Stew. The user is considering using Russet, Yukon Gold, Red Bliss, or Idaho potatoes for the Beef Stew. The user has decided to serve crusty bread and a simple green salad as side dishes with the Beef Stew. The user is looking to make changes to their meal prep routine and is interested in healthy snack options.
